overall.description: A cinematic nighttime view of a futuristic cyberpunk city featuring a circular multi-level highway interchange surrounded by neon-lit skyscrapers. A giant holographic goldfish swims through the air above the traffic, creating a surreal, high-tech atmosphere typical of science fiction game environments.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic circular highway interchange with holographic display

events.description: giant holographic goldfish swims from left to center above the highway structure
holographic goldfish completes arc and swims toward the right side of the frame

agents.ego_description: static elevated viewpoint observing the circular highway interchange and the holographic fish display

entered.detail: multi-level circular highway structure with glowing blue edge lighting and moving traffic
giant translucent orange goldfish with flowing fins swimming through the air
tall futuristic buildings covered in digital billboards and neon signage
dark reflective water feature at the center of the highway interchange

segments.scene_description: A static aerial view captures a futuristic cyberpunk cityscape at night, centered on a circular multi-level highway interchange bathed in blue neon light. A giant holographic goldfish swims slowly through the air above the structure, moving from left to right across the frame. The surrounding skyscrapers display vibrant digital advertisements, while sparse vehicle traffic moves along the highway levels below.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static aerial perspective of a futuristic cyberpunk cityscape that emphasizes the scale of a neon-lit urban hub. It begins with a wide view of a circular multi-level highway interchange bathed in deep blue neon light. As the camera holds its position, a giant holographic goldfish glides slowly through the air, drifting from left to right across the frame above the structure. The scene then expands to reveal the surrounding skyscrapers adorned with vibrant digital advertisements, while sparse vehicle traffic flows steadily along the highway levels below.
